So here your list is brand new and let's just say here your list is years old and you are going to have your list for a long time and it's going to make you money for a long time but generally when people we also call this recency. How recent has someone, how recently has someone joined your list and we see this over basically your open rate, your responsiveness is going to be at its highest when someone first pops in and then it's going to drop off as they've been on the list longer and longer. So if you go and you put a whole bunch of people on your list but then you stop adding new people to your list then your list is going to become less effective just just a general rule of thumb.
